security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420; font-src 'self'

bundle.longDescription: VIGIL turns a single mission and a focus interval into a calm desktop ritual with a Roman-inspired pixel-art companion.
